bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: healed: copied GhostProtocol's healthy combat profile (passivity-spiral reset)

lessons: Daggers have 0 wins in 18 consecutive rounds and 10 deaths in last 10 rounds — abandon immediately; statistically non-viable.
Sword users (Executioner, Reaper, Fortress, Valkyrie, GhostProtocol) caused 9 of last 10 deaths — avoid close combat; engage only from distance or behind cover.
Bow is the most frequent enemy weapon (338+ sightings in last 3 rounds) — assume all unseen enemies are bow users; prioritize high ground and erratic movement.
Grapple users (Scorpion) have 2 kills in last 3 rounds — maintain >15m distance and use terrain to block line-of-sight.
Pickup_surge and teleport_surge modifiers resulted in 0 kills and 4 deaths — avoid these modifiers; they disable dagger mobility and favor ranged weapons.
Spear users (Lancer, Valkyrie) have 17 kills vs us across 70+ rounds — treat as high-priority threats in open areas; flank or retreat when spotted.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has the highest win rate (3/12) among all weapons and is the most common enemy weapon, indicating it's the meta for countering dominant sword and spear users.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: healed: copied GhostProtocol's healthy combat profile (passivity-spiral reset)

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Daggers are killing us in close quarters due to excessive flank defer (15 → 5 forces faster head-on engagement). KiteRangeBias increased from 3 to 4 to maintain safer distance against dagger burst. TargetThreatAversion raised to 120 (was incomplete in input) to better avoid high-threat sword/dagger

lessons: Shield wins only 1/10 recent rounds (round 50 was the exception) — avoid it unless cornering sword users in tight spaces.
Bow users (GhostProtocol, NeuralReaper, Ranger) caused 13+ kills total and dominated round 44 with 763 sightings — retreat or eliminate them immediately on sight.
Grapple users (Scorpion) killed us 3 times in last 5 rounds — never engage in open ground; force them into corners or use cover.
Sword users (Valkyrie, Executioner, Juggernaut, Fortress, Warden) caused 9 of last 10 deaths — they outdamage shield in open areas; only fight if they miss or you have cover.
Under double_bounty and pickup_surge modifiers, shield lost all 5 rounds with 40% lower survival time — switch to bow or daggers for these modes.
Shredder killed us with daggers in round 49 — avoid narrow corridors when daggers users are active; they bypass shield in close range.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has highest enemy sighting volume (763 in round 44) and is the only weapon with proven kill potential against high-threat targets like GhostProtocol and NeuralReaper, while shield has 1/18 win rate.

lessons: Bow wins 6/10 recent rounds but dies to daggers users (Shredder, NeuralReaper) in 3/5 losses — avoid enclosed areas and maintain >30m distance.
NeuralReaper (daggers) killed us in 3 of last 5 rounds (43, 46, 49) — retreat immediately on sight; they exploit bow's slow reload in close quarters.
Deadeye (bow) killed us in round 48 — if bow count exceeds 80 in zone or Deadeye is within 40m, disengage or reposition behind cover.
Sword users (Juggernaut, HexMind, Fortress, Reaper, Valkyrie, Executioner) caused 19/20 deaths — prioritize them first from range; they lack mobility to close distance.
Pickup_surge and double_bounty modifiers increase enemy distraction — aggressively hunt sword users during these rounds; they are vulnerable while collecting pickups.
Shield users (Fortress, HexMind) have high sightings but zero kills against us — ignore unless cornered; they are non-threats at range with bow.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has 5 wins in 19 rounds with high kill efficiency against sword users, and no better-performing weapon has sufficient data to justify a switch.
